data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the machine running mythbackend.
data_description.upcoming_count: Number of upcoming recordings fetched per poll (1–50).
data_description.recorded_count: Number of recent recordings fetched per poll (1–50).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect — check host and port.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This MythTV backend is already configured.
